items.caption:
While serving langar alongside people from all communities in Delhi, a Muslim volunteer named "Nawab Khan" was confronted by an extremist who questioned his identity and falsely accused him of contaminating the food after hearing his Muslim name.

But instead of staying silent, people from every community present stood together against the hate and openly supported the volunteer - proving that humanity and unity will always be stronger than division
.
.
Follow @indianonfeed for daily updates 
.

items.transcript: ये पहले इसका नाम पूछ रहा है, क्या नाम है जी, तो ने कहा नवाब खान, फिर इससे शोर मचा दिया कि अंगुथा डाल के ये सबको लंगर खिला रहा है, कोई गरम गरम खिचड़ी में अंगुथा डाल के खिलाएगा, ये इंसान सुबह साड़े तीन वज़े सेवा कराने आ जाता है, और इतनी नफरत के अंदर कह रहे हो कि हम अंगुथा डा के खिला रहे हैं, ये भी मुसलिम है, सारे यहां हिंदू मुसलिम यहां सेवा चल रही है, बेशरम लोगों, ये इंसान है ये, ये देखो, ये.

items.caption:
If Dr. B. R. Ambedkar changed the destiny of millions, a big part of that strength came from Ramabai Ambedkar standing quietly beside him.
Her support may have been silent, but its impact changed history forever.

items.caption:
Noise takes you away from the truth. It also happens to make you uglier. 
.
.
.
#diabetes #india #beauty #skincare #health

ownerProfile.biography:
The one who has Peace wins
Every religion has truth, but The Truth has no religion
Optimise hormones through nutrition and circadian alignment(DM)

items.transcript: You know, noise pollution is going to affect you even if you think it doesn't affect you, if you think that the noise is something that you're not aware of. But as long as it's landing on your eardrum, it's going to have an effect on you. And you know, it's especially, it's going to make certain things that Indians are prone to, it's going to make it even worse. For example, diabetes. When you have all these noises all around you, your cortisol level is going to be elevated chronically. When you have an elevated cortisol level, combine that with a high carb diet as the average Indian actually eats all the time. You are combining cortisol with insulin, which is literally a recipe for diabetes. It's not a coincidence that Indians are the diabetic capital of this world. Okay, if you talk about it being genetic, and yes, there is a slight genetic component to it. But these things don't help because you need an environment to allow you to reach your genetic potential. And Indians also happen to be one of the least impressive physically out of all the races or whatever types of people in the world. We are known to be the least impressive in terms of physicality, whether that's in terms, especially the men. Okay, like maybe that's something that's just happened recently. It never was that way. But most Indian men are not known to be that great. In fact, if you want to compliment an Indian, just tell them they don't look Indian. They'll take it as a compliment. They all know what I'm talking about. But the environment has a lot to do. If you're going to live with this, you're not going to look your best. And cortisol is a stress hormone, is going to make it harder for you to fall asleep, to make it harder for you to absorb your food correctly, absorb glucose. It's going to make it harder for you to even breathe correctly. And eventually is going to literally make you uglier, to put it just bluntly. So it's for our own good if we just try to reduce the amount of noise, all sorts of pollution. We can do it. We can do it. This country has enormous potential. And the only reason it is what it is right now is because of simple ignorance. Peace.
